tools.name: numeral_ping
tools.description: Health check — verifies the API key works and reports the environment (test/prod), api_version, and server timestamp. Numeral: GET /tax/ping.

tools.name: numeral_calculate_tax
tools.description: Calculate sales tax / VAT for an order — a STATELESS quote that persists nothing (record it later with numeral_create_transaction using the returned calculation id). Returns per-jurisdiction rates, total_tax_amount, and totals. Provide a customer address and one or more line items (each needs refere

tools.name: numeral_get_transaction
tools.description: Get a recorded transaction by its Numeral id (tr_...). Returns the transaction with its line items, currencies, and metadata. Numeral: GET /tax/transactions/{transaction_id}.

tools.name: numeral_list_transaction_refunds
tools.description: List all refunds recorded against a transaction. Returns {refunds:[...]}. Numeral: GET /tax/transactions/{transaction_id}/refunds.

tools.name: numeral_list_products
tools.description: List your Numeral products (up to 50 per page), each with its reference id, name, and product_category. Use `cursor` (the last_product_id from a previous page) to paginate; has_more indicates more pages. Numeral: GET /tax/products.

tools.name: numeral_get_product
tools.description: Get a single product by its reference_product_id (your id). Returns the product's name, product_category, and timestamps. Numeral: GET /tax/products/{reference_product_id}.

tools.name: numeral_get_customer
tools.description: Get a customer by id. By default `customer_id` is the Numeral id (cus_...); set id_type to "reference" to look up by your own reference_customer_id. Returns name, email, and tax-exempt status. Numeral: GET /tax/customers/{customer_id}.

tools.name: numeral_create_transaction
tools.description: RECORDS a completed sale as a transaction — this WRITES a live tax/compliance record used for filings. Supply the `calculation_id` returned by numeral_calculate_tax and your `reference_order_id`. Numeral: POST /tax/transactions.

tools.name: numeral_create_refund
tools.description: RECORDS a refund against a transaction — this WRITES a live tax/compliance record (adjusts tax owed). Use type="full" to refund the whole transaction, or type="partial" with line_items (each keyed by reference_product_id) for a partial refund. Numeral: POST /tax/refunds.

tools.name: numeral_create_product
tools.description: CREATES (or upserts) a product with its tax category — this WRITES to your Numeral product catalog, which drives future tax calculations. Numeral: POST /tax/products.

tools.name: numeral_create_customer
tools.description: CREATES a customer record — this WRITES to your Numeral customer list (used for order tracking and tax exemptions). Numeral: POST /tax/customers.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: numeral_get_customer, numeral_create_customer · Private data: numeral_ping, numeral_calculate_tax, numeral_create_transaction, numeral_create_refund, numeral_create_customer · Public sink: numeral_calculate_tax, numeral_get_customer, numeral_create_transaction, numeral_create_refund, numeral_create_product, numeral_create_customer.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: numeral_get_customer, numeral_create_customer · Private data: numeral_ping, numeral_calculate_tax, numeral_create_transaction, numeral_create_refund, numeral_create_customer · Public sink: numeral_calculate_tax, numeral_get_customer, numeral_create_transaction, numeral_create_refund, numeral_create_product, numeral_create_customer

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
